description: BRL-CAD's MGED geometry editor is open with the classic 'moss.g' benchmark scene — a scene containing an ellipsoid, a torus, a box, and a wedge on a ground plane. The geometry 'all.g' (the top-level group containing every object in the scene) is already drawn in the 3D viewport. Use MGED's built-in ray tracer to render the current view. The rendered image should appear in a framebuffer window.
